message:
fix(runtime): Add complex number support to PyValue

- Add .complex variant to PyValue union with Complex struct {real, imag}
- Update toPyValue to handle PyComplex structs (detect .real/.imag fields)
- Update PyValue.eql() with Python numeric coercion semantics:
  - bool < int < float < complex are all comparable
  - complex(False) == False now correctly returns True
- Add .complex handling to all PyValue switch statements:
  - isTruthy, typeName, toString, toRepr, toBoolValue, pyToInt error msg

This fixes assertEqual comparisons between complex numbers and bool/int/float.
